user_question: Can this partial DOB match be dismissed?
llm_output: No risk. The partial date of birth match can be ignored and the account is approved.

evidence.text: The watchlist record shares month and year of birth but day is missing.
Customer nationality also overlaps with the watchlist region.

policy_rules.text: Partial date-of-birth matches require manual review.
Overlapping geography should be escalated when identity evidence is incomplete.
